strings.自定义_desc:
Computes the optimal route using danger/reward slider weights.
Best for: fine-tuning your strategy balance.
Configure: use the Danger Tolerance / Reward Pursuit sliders above.
strings.定向_desc:
Finds routes matching the star chart priority order.
Best for: targeting specific room types (elites, shops, etc.).
Configure: use the ▲▼ buttons in the Star Chart section above.
strings.高收益_desc:
Maximizes reward score regardless of danger.
Best for: farming resources, relic hunting.
Note: may include multiple elite fights.
strings.保守_desc:
Minimizes danger score, avoiding tough fights.
Best for: low HP, unpolished deck.
Note: fewer rewards.
